data.name: Glory Hole Barista
data.detailed_description:
The worker-owned café has a new loyalty program!

If a customer buys five coffees, they get to use the glory hole down the hall. As the barista, you must satisfy the specific needs of each client.

Satisfy your customers

Choose between your skills to target specific desires. But be careful: each action must be replenished, so you'll need to consider the order of operations.

Drive them crazy

Match your partner's intensity to build their pleasure. Balance their desires, lube, and intensity to unlock higher orgasm ranks. Satisfy customers to level up your abilities and unlock new actions!

Service with style

Use rewards to access several different outfits to customize your look.

Romance your regulars...

Featuring story scenes with 2+ romanceable characters!

...and maybe your work crush?!

data.short_description: A short, sweet, 3D simulation about a café with a unique marketing strategy! And in case you were wondering, no, you won't be preparing much coffee...
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: intel i7+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 690
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: intel i7+
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1080
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
